calibration.calibration_note: With hazard_harm=0.02, avg episode ~182 steps (was ~18 with 0.5). Actual episode time higher.

items.title: SD-057 cue-recall post-cue action/gradient measurement-only diagnostic (gates 638b)
items.note: Measurement-only re-run of the V3-EXQ-638a ARM_OFF/ARM_CUE_ON ablation, behaviourally UNCHANGED, with scaffold_post_cue_instrumentation=True in both arms. Routed by failure_autopsy_V3-EXQ-638a_2026-06-05: 638a settled cue 'fires vs lifts contact' (C3 FAIL) but logged no post-cue action trace, so it could not discriminate cue-to-action AUTHORITY / displacement / gradient-following / hazard-interrupt. 640 captures per-cue-fire windowed z_goal norm/pull delta, post-cue approach rate vs background, first-gradient-improving-move latency, hazard-interrupt rate, oscillation -- the discriminator the 638a-autopsy grid reads. GATES the planned 638b interoceptive build. experiment_purpose=diagnostic, claim_ids=[] (weights no governance score). PASS=measurement succeeded (C1 cue fires + C2 post-cue trace captured); the scientific read is applied at review, NOT here. Do NOT tune to pass; do NOT build 638b until 640 routes.
